## MarketList type

List of Markets. Will differentiate between indexer and rpc context

 C Context - the context to fetch the marketlist for.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare type MarketList<C extends Context<MS>, MS extends MetadataStorage = MetadataStorage> = Market<C, MS>[];
```
